prompt: create an illustrated version of a sketch of this louse
prompt_refined: Edit image 1, which features a magnified, photorealistic view of a louse. Transform the louse into an illustrated sketch. The output should be a detailed, monochrome illustration of the louse, rendered with clear lines, hatching, and shading to mimic a hand-drawn pencil or ink sketch, while accurately representing the form and intricate features visible in image 1.
objects: Fine surface details of the louse
